name: Sauteed Eggplant with Tomato-Garlic Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut stem off eggplant.
2. Remove strips of skin with a vegetable peeler.
3. Cut lengthwise in half, then crosswise into 1/4-inch thick slices.
4. Spread on a cookie sheet and sprinkle with lots of salt.
5. Put in a colander and set aside for 4 hours.
6. Rinse well and drain.
7. Heat oil in a skillet and fry eggplant slices over high heat until they are golden brown on all sides. Drain.
8. Pour off all but 1 tablespoon olive oil.
9. Mash tomatoes with a fork and put into the skillet.
10. Simmer, stirring often, for 5 to 10 minutes, until they form a thin sauce.
11. Blend in tomato paste and water. Cook 1 minute.
12. Stir in garlic and vinegar and remove from heat.
13. Arrange eggplant slices on a serving dish and pour over sauce. Serve warm as part of a buffet.
